member.name: T:Day3.Employee
member.summary:
Represents an employee in a company
Employee is identified by ID, Name, Security_level, Salary, HireDate, Gender, and Privilege.

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.id
member.summary: gets or sets the unique identifier for the employee.

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.name
member.summary: gets or sets the name of the employee.

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.security_level
member.summary: gets or sets the security level of the employee

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.salary
member.summary: gets or sets the salary of the employee

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.hire_date
member.summary: gets or sets the hiring date of the employee

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.gender
member.summary: gets or sets the gender of the employee

member.name: P:Day3.Employee.privilege
member.summary: gets or sets the security privilege of the employee

member.name: M:Day3.Employee.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,Day3.HiringDate,Day3.Gender,Day3.SecurityPrivilege)
member.summary: initializes a new instance of the employee

member.name: M:Day3.Employee.ToString
member.summary: overrides the ToString method to provide a string representation of the employee's information
member.returns: string representation of the employee's information

member.name: M:Day3.Employee.CompareTo(Day3.Employee)
member.summary: compares employees based on their hiring date
member.returns: negative if this employee was hired before the other, positive if this employee was hired after the other, and zero if they were hired on the same date

member.name: T:Day3.Gender
member.summary: Specifies the gender of an individual as male or female.
member.remarks: accepts two values: M for male and F for female

member.name: T:Day3.HiringDate
member.summary: Represents a specific date used for hiring purposes.
member.remarks: hiring date is represented by three integer fields: day, month, and year.

member.name: P:Day3.HiringDate.day
member.summary: gets or sets the day of the date

member.name: P:Day3.HiringDate.month
member.summary: gets or sets the month of the date

member.name: P:Day3.HiringDate.year
member.summary: gets or sets the year of the date

member.name: M:Day3.HiringDate.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: initializes a new instance of the hiring date

member.name: M:Day3.HiringDate.ToString
member.summary: creates a string representation of the hiring date in the format "day/month/year"
member.returns: string representation of the hiring date

member.name: M:Day3.HiringDate.CompareTo(Day3.HiringDate)
member.summary: compares hiring date based on datetime comparer function where the hiring date that was hired earlier is considered less than the one that was hired later
member.returns: negative if this date was before the other, positive if this date was after the other, and zero if they were on the same date

member.name: T:Day3.SecurityPrivilege
member.summary: Defines the security privileges available within the system
member.remarks: a security privilege is represented by a byte value, where each bit represents a specific privilege.

member.name: T:Day4.EmployeeSearch
member.summary: provide methods to search faster for employees

member.name: F:Day4.EmployeeSearch.nationalIDs
member.summary: list of natioal ids of employees

member.name: F:Day4.EmployeeSearch.employees
member.summary: list of all employees

member.name: M:Day4.EmployeeSearch.#ctor(System.Int32[],Day3.Employee[])
member.summary: creates instance of employee search with the given national ids and employees

member.name: M:Day4.EmployeeSearch.SearchByNationalID(System.Int32)
member.summary: method to search for employee by national id
member.param: id t osearch for its employee
member.returns: employee if found, dummy one if not

member.name: M:Day4.EmployeeSearch.SearchByHiringDate(Day3.HiringDate)
member.summary: method to search for employee by national hiring date
member.param: hiring date to search for its employee
member.returns: employee if found, dummy one if not

member.name: M:Day4.EmployeeSearch.SearchByName(System.String)
member.summary: method to search for employees by national name
member.param: name to search for its employee
member.returns: all employees with given name as array if found, dummy one if not

member.name: P:Day4.EmployeeSearch.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: meghod to access employee by national id using indexer

member.name: P:Day4.EmployeeSearch.Item(Day3.HiringDate)
member.summary: method to get employee by hiring date using indexer
member.param: hiring date to get its employee

member.name: P:Day4.EmployeeSearch.Item(System.String)
member.summary: method to get employee by name using indexer
member.param: name to search for its employees
member.returns: array of all employees with given name
